artifact: Finds the driver surname for raceId 19 with the minimum second qualifying lap field q2.
sql:
SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q."driverId" = d."driverId"
WHERE q."raceId" = 19
  AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY q.q2 ASC
LIMIT 1;

raw_response.sql:
SELECT d.surname
